channel.title: MWCGA Radio
channel.description: Make the World Cup Great Again — the official twice-daily show of the Hamilton family World Cup league. Hank and Sal break down every result, every feud, every point. June 11 – July 19, 2026.
channel.itunes:author: The Commissioner

item.title: 🌙 Nightcap — June 17
item.description: MWCGA Radio — the official end-of-day wrap of the greatest family World Cup league on Earth. Day-by-day results, standings, and feuds. 2026-06-17.

item.title: ☀️ Morning Show — June 17
item.description: MWCGA Radio — the official morning preview of the greatest family World Cup league on Earth. Day-by-day results, standings, and feuds. 2026-06-17.

item.title: 🏆 THE SEASON PREMIERE — The Draft Special
item.description: MWCGA Radio — the official morning preview of the greatest family World Cup league on Earth. Day-by-day results, standings, and feuds. 2026-06-10.
